[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110000 3
1 1011110 5
2 1100100 3
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0011100 3
7 1100000 2

01 10 0000000 a match 3 4 5
12 21 1000000 1
23 32 0000110 2
34 43 0100110 3
45 54 1110000 3 match 0
56 65 1010000 2
67 76 1000100 2
70 07 0000100 1

13 31 0100000 1

35 53 0100000 1

60 06 0011100 3 match 6
71 17 1100000 2 match 7

14 41 1100000 2 match 7

47 74 1100100 3 match 2
50 05 0010000 1
61 16 1000000 1
72 27 1000100 2

15 51 1100000 2 match 7
26 62 1000110 3
37 73 0100100 2
